sourceSections: Introducing the /teach AI Skill for Personalized Tutoring
The Stateful Advantage Over Traditional AI Tutors
Comprehensive Learning Ecosystem and Interactive Lessons
The Pedagogical Foundation: Knowledge, Skills, Wisdom & ZPD

sections.lead: Matt Pocock introduced the free /teach skill for Claude Code Agent, turning it into a stateful, personalized AI tutor for various topics.

bullets.label: Free Skill
bullets.text: Matt Pocock developed the free /teach skill for Claude Code Agent to offer personalized tutoring.

bullets.label: Stateful AI
bullets.text: Unlike standard AI, /teach remembers user progress, questions, and areas of difficulty for continuous learning.

bullets.label: Broad Utility
bullets.text: The skill is highlighted as potentially the most useful for learning diverse topics like coding, frameworks, or open-source models.

sections.lead: The stateful nature of /teach differentiates it from traditional AI, providing a consistent, personalized teaching experience that tracks user progress.

bullets.label: Stateful Differentiator
bullets.text: /teach's key differentiator is its stateful nature, contrasting with typical AI chats that provide one-off answers and reset context.

bullets.label: Consistent Teacher
bullets.text: Unlike substitute-teacher-like AI, /teach acts as a consistent teacher by tracking learned material and areas of difficulty.

bullets.label: Personalized Progression
bullets.text: It logs user questions and purposefully picks the next lesson based on current understanding, ensuring continuous progress.

sections.lead: /teach creates a structured learning ecosystem within your OS, featuring dynamic, interactive lessons tailored to your progress and hardware.

bullets.label: Structured Workspace
bullets.text: The skill creates a structured learning environment with dedicated folders for each topic within your operating system.

bullets.label: Dynamic Content
bullets.text: This workspace includes learning records, dynamically generated interactive HTML lesson plans, and a growing glossary of terms.

bullets.label: Action-Oriented
bullets.text: Lessons are action-oriented, featuring install commands, checklists, self-checks, and the ability to generate quizzes for active learning.

bullets.label: Hardware Adaptation
bullets.text: The AI adapts lessons to your hardware capabilities, recommending appropriate models for better performance.

sections.lead: Built on Matt Pocock's decade of teaching, /teach uses pedagogical principles like ZPD to foster genuine learning across knowledge, skills, and wisdom.

bullets.label: Pedagogical Core
bullets.text: /teach is built upon Matt Pocock's 10 years of teaching experience, focusing on genuine learning over mere information delivery.

bullets.label: Three Levels
bullets.text: Its philosophy covers acquiring Knowledge from vetted sources, building Skills through hands-on practice, and gaining Wisdom from communities.

bullets.label: ZPD Application
bullets.text: The skill leverages the "Zone of Proximal Development" (ZPD) by tailoring lessons to be challenging yet achievable for optimal engagement.

sections.lead: Installing /teach involves fetching it from GitHub, then initiating a topic with Claude Code to set up a personalized workspace.

bullets.label: Installation Steps
bullets.text: Users install /teach by fetching it from the {slash}skills GitHub repository and instructing Claude Code Agent to install it.

bullets.label: Learning Path Setup
bullets.text: Initiating /teach [topic] prompts the AI to ask about your "why" for a mission statement and desired "depth" like hands-on code.

bullets.label: Workspace Customization
bullets.text: The process includes web searches for initial information and setting up the workspace, potentially involving moving folders to the desired directory.

sections.lead: /teach is a powerful tool facilitating structured, personalized learning, but true understanding still requires user commitment and active engagement.

bullets.label: Tool Not Magic
bullets.text: While a powerful tutor, /teach is a tool that facilitates effective learning, not a shortcut or magic solution.

bullets.label: User Engagement
bullets.text: Users must still commit to doing the "reps" and actively engaging with the material for true understanding.

bullets.label: Guide to Learning
bullets.text: AI can outsource research, but /teach serves as an excellent guide for personal effort and engagement until ready to join a community.
